message:
refactor(wasm): Remove dead GROUP BY code - use shared ve.HashGroupBy

WASM sql_executor now uses ve.HashGroupBy from vector_engine.zig
for GROUP BY operations - same implementation as CLI executor.

Removed ~217 lines of dead code:
- groupHashInit(), groupHashBuild(), groupHashBuildFromSlice()
- Static globals: group_buckets, group_entries, row_group_ids
- groupHashGetKey(), groupHashGetCount(), groupHashGetFirstRow()
- Unused AGG_BATCH_SIZE, global_agg_states

Single code path for GROUP BY: ve.HashGroupBy (WASM and CLI)
